configuration.title: Shelf
configuration.shelf.enableOnSave.descrip: Run canonical validation when a relevant file is saved.
configuration.shelf.validationTriggerMod: Choose whether Shelf validates only on demand, only on save, or on all watched workspace events.
configuration.shelf.notifyOnAutoFail.des: Show notification when auto validation detects canonical issues.
configuration.shelf.guardMode.descriptio: Choose whether Shelf only reports generated-artifact edits or automatically restores them.
configuration.shelf.autoMaterialize.desc: Automatically run project materialization when framework markdown or project.toml changes.
configuration.shelf.runMypyOnPythonChang: Run mypy after relevant Python changes under src/, scripts/, or tests/.
configuration.shelf.promptInstallGitHook: Prompt once per session to enable the repository .githooks path when missing.
configuration.shelf.intentGateEnabled.de: Enable the governed-task intent gate. Guarded implementation saves require an active mapping-confirmed task session.
configuration.shelf.intentGateEnforcemen: Choose whether guarded saves only warn or are blocked/reverted when no active governed-task session exists.
configuration.shelf.intentGateRequireMap: Require an explicit QuickPick confirmation of canonical mappings before granting a governed-task session.
configuration.shelf.intentGateRunChangeV: Run `validate_canonical.py --check-changes` before granting a governed-task session.
configuration.shelf.intentGateAutoOpenOu: Auto-open the Shelf output channel after intent-to-framework mapping analysis.
configuration.shelf.intentGateMinimumSco: Minimum mapping score threshold for intent-to-framework gate matching.
configuration.shelf.intentGateMaxMatches: Maximum number of canonical mapping candidates retained in a governed-task session.
configuration.shelf.intentGateSessionTtl: Time-to-live for a governed-task session. Expired sessions are cleared and guarded saves are blocked again.
configuration.shelf.intentGateGuardedPat: Workspace-relative path prefixes guarded by the intent gate on save. Default scope targets framework-document-related paths and coupled implementation code; use `*` only when you explicitly want full-workspace interception.
configuration.shelf.intentGateIgnoredPat: Workspace-relative path prefixes excluded from intent-gate save interception.
configuration.shelf.intentGateTemporaryB: Temporary local bypass switches for intent gate checks. Use an empty array to keep strict behavior, a selected subset to bypass specific checks, or `[*]` to bypass all listed checks.
configuration.shelf.fullValidationComman: Command used for manual full validation.
configuration.shelf.materializeCommand.d: Base command used for Shelf auto-materialization. Shelf appends --project-file arguments for affected project.toml files.
configuration.shelf.typeCheckCommand.des: Command used when Shelf runs Python type checks after relevant source changes.
configuration.shelf.frameworkTreeNodeHor: Horizontal gap, in pixels, between framework tree nodes within the same level.
configuration.shelf.frameworkTreeLevelVe: Vertical gap, in pixels, between framework tree levels.
configuration.shelf.treeZoomMinScale.des: Minimum zoom scale for Shelf tree webviews.
configuration.shelf.treeZoomMaxScale.des: Maximum zoom scale for Shelf tree webviews.
configuration.shelf.treeWheelSensitivity: Wheel zoom sensitivity multiplier for Shelf tree webviews.
configuration.shelf.treeInspectorWidth.d: Preferred inspector panel width, in pixels, for Shelf tree webviews.
configuration.shelf.treeInspectorRailWid: Collapsed inspector rail width, in pixels, for Shelf tree webviews.
configuration.shelf.validationCommandTim: Timeout, in milliseconds, for Shelf validation and preflight commands.
configuration.shelf.generatedEventSuppre: Suppression window, in milliseconds, for generated file watcher events right after materialization.
configuration.shelf.manualValidationRest: Elapsed time threshold, in milliseconds, before Shelf can restart a stale validation command on manual retrigger.
configuration.shelf.validationDebounceMs: Debounce delay, in milliseconds, before Shelf starts a queued validation run.
